title: Full-Body Strength Maintenance
objective: Keep real full-body strength in the week while protecting Thursday's threshold confidence check.
why_now: Monday's aerobic re-entry was strong, so the bike proof point moves earlier. Strength stays in the week, but lower-body work must not create soreness before Thursday.

source_context.week_objective: Restart rhythm and validate threshold readiness without catch-up fatigue.

targets.notes: 60 minutes. Lower body RPE 5-6 with 2-3 reps in reserve. Upper body RPE 6-7. No failure, no finisher, no lower-body soreness chasing.

centr_recommendation.primary: Centr full-body or upper/lower strength session, using the coach table as the prescription
alternatives: Strength for Sports upper-body plus lower-body basics
centr_recommendation.notes: Use Centr for demos or substitutions; keep lower body controlled and upper body honest.

gym_table.exercise: Dumbbell bench press or machine chest press

nutrition.pre: Normal meal 2-4h before. If training hungry, take 20-30g carbs plus 10-20g protein 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst, roughly 400-750ml/hour. Electrolytes only if hot or you sweat heavily.
nutrition.post: Protein-forward meal/snack with 25-35g protein; add 30-60g carbs if dinner is delayed.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Protein-forward meal/snack and easy walking if legs feel stiff.
recovery.evening: No extra lower-body work. Prioritize sleep.
recovery.next_morning_check: If soreness is more than mild, make Wednesday rest and keep Thursday protected.

skill_focus.action: Keep lower-body reps controlled and symmetrical, especially through the left calf/ankle chain.
skill_focus.why: Strength supports durable power only if it does not create compensation before Thursday.

skill_focus.action: Upper body can work honestly; lower body stops with 2-3 reps in reserve.
skill_focus.why: This respects the strength goal while preserving the bike proof point.

mental_focus.why: The week gets its confidence test on the bike, so gym work has to support that test.
mental_focus.reset: If a lower-body set turns grindy, stop the set, reduce load or reps, and keep the rest of the session upper-body/core focused.

pre_interval_cues: This is useful strength, not catch-up training.
during_workout_cues: Upper body can work harder than legs.
execution_notes.if_too_easy: Add one upper-body accessory set, not heavy leg volume.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: Reduce lower-body work to one set each.
